news.t: All eyes are now on the bond market as oil prices fall. Will the Fed hike rates?
Higher Bond Yields Are Making Things Uncomfortable for Stock Investors
Fixed Income Markets in a Higher for Longer Environment
AI Debt Floods The Bond Market, And Fidelity Is Backing Away

overview.description: The Schwab US TIPS ETF (SCHP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value weighted index of US Treasury inflation-protected securities with at least one year remaining in maturity. SCHP was launched on Aug 5, 2010 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Treasury Inflation Protected Notes (TIPS)

data.title: Investors are rushing to buy TIPS ETFs to beat inflation. They could end up losing.
data.text: Inflation-protected funds don't always protect against inflation. As consumer-price inflation hits a three-year high due to the Iran war, the premise in their names is being tested.
